w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: know that if change the entire database structure now, then we will have to update all the codes we have created so far. but
in future, so can we just delete all the existing tables and data and make all new data from
as given below, but also keep 1 thing in your mind that
your job to take final decision
to go with existing data structure or have new one. I would
it if you argue with me (only if necessary). the new structure is as follows
Table 4 — Teacher Subjects (Links teachers to subjects & classes)
One teacher can teach multiple subjects in multiple classes. This table handles that.
This table exists because one parent can have 2 children in the same school. This handles that cleanly.
allergens → "milk, groundnut" ← auto alerts allergic students' parents
